Wisconsin-based Photographer

Emily Doud
Photography

Warm, botanical, and intentional. Natural light, honest moments, and images made to last. Portrait, lifestyle, landscape, and beyond.

Book a Session → View Gallery

What I Shoot

Portraits & People

  • Senior portraits

    Marking the milestone with images that capture your graduate's personality

  • Individual & personal portraits

    Updated photos for any purpose or occasion

  • Family photography

    Relaxed, natural sessions that capture your family as it is right now

  • Couples & engagement sessions

    For the moments worth remembering

  • Maternity & newborn

    Gentle sessions documenting a new chapter

  • Pet photography

    Because they're family too

Professional & Business

  • Professional headshots

    Polished, current images for LinkedIn, websites, and bios

  • Team & group headshots

    Consistent, professional photos for your whole staff

  • Business & brand photography

    Product, marketing, and storytelling images for your business

  • Real estate & property

    Bright, well-composed listing photos that help properties sell

Events

  • Private events & celebrations

    Parties, anniversaries, reunions, and gatherings

  • Corporate events & conferences

    Professional coverage of your business events

  • Graduation & school events

    Capturing the day for students and families

Portrait Editorial Lifestyle Product Promotional

Every session starts with a conversation. I want to understand what you're trying to say before I pick up a camera — whether that's a brand shoot, a portrait session, or editorial work.

The studio comes to you. Whether it's the comfort of your home, a sun-drenched park, or a location that holds meaning — I'll bring the eye, the equipment, and the vision. You bring the place.

Landscape

Capturing Wisconsin's
Natural Beauty

Wisconsin has a quiet, unhurried beauty — golden fields, still water, and skies that stretch wide. This collection grows with every season, every drive, and every moment worth stopping for.

Photojournalism

On the Scene

Documenting moments as they happen — community events, local stories, and the people behind them. Real moments, honest frames.

Pricing

Pricing varies based on the type of session, location, and deliverables. Reach out and we'll find something that works for you.

Email for Pricing →
